title: AI Marketing & Ecosystem Lead AI营销与生态负责人（AI Native方向）
aboutUs: 全球领先的数字资产交易平台，拥有超过1.2亿注册用户，提供现货、合约、期权等全方位区块链产品和服务。
jobDescription:
not looking for a marketer who only uses ChatGPT to write copy. We want an “AI Native” growth hacker with extreme curiosity for AI, capable of using code and prompts to rewire trading scenarios.
You will operate at the AI x Crypto intersection and own two missions:
Internal: Use AI to overhaul the growth funnel so content creation, distribution, and optimization run at 10x efficiency.
External: Make the trading platform the “go-to plugin” for AI Agents—drive AI product integrations and build an automated growth flywheel.
If yfirst reaction to a viral post is “how do I reproduce this hook with prompts,” and to a new AI model is “what’s its underlying search logic and how do we game it,” you’re the person we want.
Core Responsibilities: Think like AI, execute for growth
AI-driven content growth experiments (Build with AI)
Plug-and-play hot topics: Use LLM + RAG for real-time trend ingestion (newsjacking). You won’t handwrite posts; you’ll design an automated SOP that maps hot topics → content generation → multi-version A/B testing. You tune the prompts; AI outputs 100 stylistically varied tweets.
Content factory standardization: Establish an “AI content factory” SOP. Given a trading campaign brief, AI should generate: 5 distinct hooks, a data script for an infographic, a shot-by-shot short video storyboard, and even a question script for Spaces hosts.
Automated distribution and iteration: Compliantly leverage AI tools for multi-account, multi-time-zone scheduling and distribution. You’re training a “growth model” to auto-optimize prompts and strategy based on data feedback, not manually posting.
Data-driven AI growth flywheel (Measure with AI)
AI-based attribution: Build dashboards—and go beyond raw numbers. Use AI for sentiment analysis, topic clustering, and semantic similarity to quickly answer: which content converts to trades, and which KOL’s followers overlap most with trader personas?
Weekly experimentation engine: Run weekly growth sprints, e.g.
requirements:
AI原住民：你对AI不是“会用”，而是“共生”。你订阅了ChatGPT Plus/Claude Pro，你天天研究最新的Prompt技巧，你看到一个新出的AI工具会第一时间去玩。你对LangChain、RAG、Tool Calling有实战认知（哪怕只是做过个人项目）。
增长黑客脑：你有极强的假设-实验-复盘思维。你不信权威，只信数据。你能接受80%的实验失败，只要剩下的20%能带来指数级增长。懂基本的UTM、归因、A/B测试方法论。
聪明且自驱：藤校或顶尖院校背景是加分项，但不是必需。我们需要的是学习速度极快的人。给你一周时间，你能把一个新的AI框架或交易协议研究透，并输出一份可落地的实验方案。
语言与表达：英文能力极强，不是只为了写邮件，而是能在X上发Thread、在Spaces里讲清楚AI如何赋能交易、甚至在开发者大会上做一个英文演讲。
懂交易（加分，但可学）：你不需要是资深交易员，但你必须对现货/合约、资金费率、滑点、Perp DEX有基础概念，并且有兴趣深入研究。因为只有懂了交易场景，你才知道AI该从哪里切入。

线下/大会联动：TOKEN2049、KBW 等期间的联合活动/Side Event/Spaces，提升品牌声量与线索
数据、合规与协同指标看板：展示/互动率/粉丝净增、点击/注册/入金/交易转化；内容与合作 A/B 测试
风险与合规：不同法域的推广限制、披露与免责声明、反诈骗/钓鱼提示与快速处置
跨团队协作：与产品、交易、运营、市场、关与法务对齐节奏与口径，形成闭环
requirements:
Strong Chinese and English; able to produce high-quality content and host in both languages, and handle business communication.
Trader at heart: live trading experience (spot or derivatives). Deep understanding of greed, fear, FOMO, and FUD; you know slippage, depth, liquidations—and can have substantive conversations with trading KOLs.
Attention-capturing skill set: expert at hooks, agenda-setting, newsjacking, and social virality mechanics.
1+ years in social/content/community operations (crypto or fintech preferred); proven X (Twitter) case studies with measurable results.
Own or can rapidly build trading KOL resources; capable of negotiation, contracting, and end-to-end project delivery.
Data-driven: fluent with UTM/short links, attribution, and dashboards; can read both trading data and ops data; can distinguish airdrop hunters from true trading contributors.
Tools and execution: familiar with X Pro/TweetDeck, scheduling and listening tools; understand Galxe/Zealy/Layer3 task platforms and running Spaces.
Comfortable with a fast pace and cross-time-zone work; able to respond during major market sessions.
Nice-to-Haves
You are a known trader/copy trader with your own follower group or paid community.
Experience at a top exchange in community or marketing, owning recruitment and management of trading KOLs.
Light design/video editing skills; can produce short clips or memes that resonate with traders.
Familiarity with CEX/DEX ecosystems, AMMs, aggregators, and on-chain anal
